name: AI Code Snippet Generator
description: Takes a coding topic or problem description, uses Claude AI to generate well-documented code examples with explanations in the requested programming language, and posts the result to Slack with Block Kit formatting. Adapted from n8n's interactive JavaScript tutorial workflow.

source.originalName: Learn Code Node (JavaScript) with an Interactive Hands-On Tutorial

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting code snippets

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the code examples

codingTask.description: Description of the coding task or concept (e.g. 'Binary search implementation', 'React useEffect patterns')

language.description: Programming language for the code examples (JavaScript, Python, TypeScript, Go, etc.)

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for code generation
Build Slack Block Kit code snippet message
